content.text:
Here are some of the top-rated facial spas and medspas in Katy, TX, offering a range of services—from luxurious relaxation to medically advanced skin treatments:

• **TSUKI Facial & Spa** – A serene, appointment-only boutique focusing on personalized facials and head spa rituals. Their “Luxury without excess” approach creates a calming, minimalist environment. Popular options include a 90-minute customized facial (~$75), a head spa, and combination treatments up to 150 minutes (~$135) ([tsukispa.com](https://tsukispa.com/?utm_source=openai)).

• **Soo Med Spa** – A newer premium medspa in the area offering medical-grade facials such as signature treatments, HydraFacials, chemical peels, microneedling, RF microneedling (Morpheus8), plus injectables like Botox and fillers. They emphasize tailored, science-backed care delivered in a luxurious setting ([soomedspa.com](https://soomedspa.com/?utm_source=openai)).

• **Revitalize Infusion & Aesthetics** – A well-reviewed (5-star) medspa supervised by certified nurse practitioners. They offer a broad selection of advanced facial treatments—HydroFacial, PRP, Oxygen, microneedling, VI Peel, and Salmon DNA facials—alongside spa-day packages and in-house financing ([revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com](https://www.revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com/?utm_source=openai)).

• **Katy Medi Spa** – A physician-led spa providing a comprehensive suite of medically oriented skin treatments. Services include facials, microdermabrasion, dermaplaning, chemical peels, IPL photofacials, microneedling, and more—all delivered in a relaxed, intimate environment ([katymedispa.com](https://www.katymedispa.com/?utm_source=openai)).

• **Selah MediSpa** – Offers a broad spectrum of aesthetic services, including HydraFacials, skin tightening, microneedling, body contouring, and injectables (e.g., Botox, fillers). Their tagline, “Luxury Made Affordable,” captures their appeal ([selahmedispa.com](https://selahmedispa.com/?utm_source=openai)).

• **Suimin Spa** – A serene spa blending traditional Eastern healing and modern techniques. Offers highly customized facials—such as hydrating, collagen-boosting, brightening, and express glow options—within a relaxing, wellness-focused atmosphere ([suiminspa.com](https://www.suiminspa.com/?utm_source=openai)).

• **Oasis Laser MedSpa** – Offers accessible and targeted treatments, including HydroFacials ($120), acne-focused facials ($150), microneedling, chemical peels, and IPL therapies for acne and hyperpigmentation ([oasis-laser-medspa.square.site](https://oasis-laser-medspa.square.site/?utm_source=openai)).

• **Legacy Med Spa Katy** – A newer medspa dedicated to refined, evidence-based aesthetics. Services include custom facials, microneedling, injectables, IV hydration, and medical weight loss. They have received glowing local feedback and maintain a 5.0 average from client reviews ([legacyspakaty.com](https://legacyspakaty.com/?utm_source=openai)).

---

**What’s Best for You?**

Consider the following when choosing your facial spa:

- **Experience or Comfort**: TSUKI, Suimin Spa, and Oasis offer soothing, spa-like environments focused on relaxation.  
- **Advanced Medical Treatments**: Soo Med Spa, Revitalize, Katy Medi Spa, Selah, and Legacy provide medical-grade facials and aesthetic services backed by medical professionals.  
- **Affordability**: Selah emphasizes accessible pricing, while Oasis has straightforward, value-conscious pricing.  
- **Customization & Approach**: TSUKI, Suimin, and Soo focus on personalized, tailored experiences.

---

**Next Steps**  
1. **Review services and pricing** through each spa’s site or contact them directly.  
2. **Check availability**—some like TSUKI may require deposits or scheduled appointments ahead of time.  
3. **Read recent reviews** (Google, Yelp) for feedback on quality and service.  
4. **Book a consultation** or **start with a single facial** to experience the environment, providers’ skills, and comfort level firsthand.

Let me know if you’d like deeper details on any of these spas, help narrowing choices based on your skin concerns (e.g., acne, hydration, anti-aging), or assistance with booking or preparing for your spa visit!
